name: Mom's Cookie Press Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add the flour and salt, mixing well with a spatula or wooden spoon.
5. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
6. Using a cookie press, form dough into shortbread shapes and place on prepared baking sheet.
7. Bake for 15-18 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Allow cookies to cool completely before serving.
